Bus Timings

E304 Bus Schedule Al Satwa Bus Station to Al Jubail Bus Station at Sharjah

October 28, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route proves invaluable for both daily commuters and those seeking to explore the vibrant shopping districts of Sharjah. With its frequent service and strategic stops, the E304 plays an integral role in bridging the public transport networks of Dubai and Sharjah.

Operational Details

The E304 bus operates consistently throughout the day, accommodating early morning commuters as well as evening travelers. This ensures a reliable and timely transit option between the two emirates.

From Al Satwa Bus Station From Al Jubail Bus Station, Sharjah
06:30 06:30
07:00 07:00
07:30 07:30
08:00 08:00
08:30 08:30
09:00 09:00
09:30 09:30
10:00 10:00
10:30 10:30
11:00 11:00
11:30 11:30
12:00 12:00
12:30 12:30
13:00 13:00
13:30 13:30
14:00 14:00
14:30 14:30
15:00 15:00
15:30 15:30
16:00 16:00

17:00 17:00
17:30 17:30
18:00 18:00
18:30 18:30
19:00 19:00
19:30 19:30
20:00 20:00
20:30 20:30
21:00 21:00
21:30 21:30
22:00 22:00
22:30 22:30

Bus E304 Timetable

For comprehensive schedule information, interested parties are encouraged to visit the official RTA website or consult the E304 Bus Timings. And for the timetable from Al Satwa Bus Station to Al Jubail Bus Station, Sharjah, you can check the timetable below:

Ticket Pricing: A journey on the E304 bus is priced at AED 10, payable via the Nol card system, Dubai’s streamlined cashless payment solution. Passengers can conveniently replenish their Nol cards at numerous locations across Dubai and Sharjah, facilitating a smooth travel experience.

Route Overview

Notable stops along this route include:

  1. Al Satwa Bus Station The route’s point of origin.

  2. Al Karama Bus Station Situated in a central district renowned for its shopping and dining establishments.

  3. Sharjah, Ithihad Road, Ansar Mall A popular retail destination in Sharjah.

  4. Sharjah, Ithihad Road, Al Safeer Mall Another significant shopping complex along the route.

  5. Al Wahda Road, Subway A key stop in Sharjah’s bustling commercial center.

  6. Sharjah, Al Wahda Center 2 In close proximity to the thriving Al Wahda shopping district.

  7. City Center 1 One of Sharjah’s premier shopping destinations.

  8. King Faisal Road, Jumbo (Sony) A notable retail landmark.

  9. ADNOC Petrol Station A convenient stop for motorists.

  10. King Faisal Road, Gold Souq (Old) A cultural and commercial hub in Sharjah.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Al Jubail Bus Station The route’s terminus, offering connections to various local Sharjah routes.

Accessibility Features

The E304 bus is equipped with modern accessibility features to ensure comfortable travel for all passengers. These include low-floor buses for ease of boarding, designated seating for passengers with special needs, and audio-visual aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

The E304 route offers seamless connectivity with other public transportation options at both Al Satwa and Al Jubail bus stations.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  • Al Karama Shopping District

  • Ansar Mall and Al Safeer Mall
  • City Center Sharjah
  • Sharjah Gold Souq

Journey Experience

A journey on the E304 bus from Al Satwa Bus Station to Al Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah offers an extensive yet engaging transit through two dynamic urban centers. Departing from the lively streets of Al Satwa, known for its diverse markets and culinary offerings, the bus passes through key areas such as Karama, home to bustling shopping districts and multicultural communities.

This journey not only connects Dubai to Sharjah but also provides insight into the harmonious blend of modernity and tradition in both cities. Upon reaching Al Jubail Bus Station, travelers will have experienced a comprehensive cross-section of the UAE’s urban landscape.

Tips and Travel Advice

  • Consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid congestion at popular stops such as Al Satwa Bus Station and Sharjah’s shopping centers.

  • Ensure your Nol card is adequately loaded prior to boarding to prevent delays.
  • Utilize the RTA app for access to real-time updates and schedules for the E304 bus and other routes.

With its strategically placed stops, seamless connectivity, and accessibility features, this route caters to the needs of both commuters and visitors.

Whether your journey is motivated by work commitments, retail therapy, or exploration of Sharjah, the E304 bus provides a convenient and efficient mode of travel.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 28, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
